data: One-Pan Lemon Herb Salmon: Place 4 salmon fillets on a baking sheet lined with foil. Drizzle with 2 tbsp melted butter and 2 tbsp fresh lemon juice. Season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and fresh dill. Arrange thin lemon slices on top. Bake at 400F (200C) for 12-15 minutes until the salmon flakes easily with a fork.
